calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for Cerise Lee (Petitioner).

Counsel expressed the desire to waive the bond. The Court stated that the daughter is not 18 and without valid consents of all heirs, the bond cannot be waived. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (order for the same signed in open court). Bond in the amount of $100,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
